title: <div>   - Encourages reflection on what is working well and what could be improv
content:
- Encourages reflection on what is working well and what could be improved.
- Helps the instructor adjust the course to better fit student needs.

2. **Prompt Options**
- **Concrete:** What aspects of this course have been most helpful to you so far? What would you change?
- **Abstract:** What does a supportive learning environment look like to you? How can a course structure help or hinder learning?
- **Connecting:** Think of a time when you struggled with an assignment or concept in this course. What helped you overcome the challenge?
- **Exploratory:** If you were designing this course, what would you do differently?

3. **Discussion After Writing**
- What feedback do you think is most valuable for an instructor to receive?
- How can student input shape the way a course is taught?
- Did writing about your experience change how you view your role as a student?

📌 **Assignment for Day 4:**
- **Week 1 | Weekly Writing Warm-Up (Submission in Canvas)**
context: From document: **ENG 101 - Week 1 Class Schedules (Days 1, 2, 3, & 4)** — chunk 20 (chunk 20/26)
